name: Super Meddl Boy
short_description: Super Meddl Boy is an action-packed platformer game. Only the toughest Meddlers make it to the finish line - are you ready to take the stage?
detailed_description: Super Meddl Boy is an action-packed platform game that impresses with quick reflexes and precise platforming. Inspired by classic hardcore platformers, you take on the role of Meddl Boy, a die-hard metal fan who fights his way through dangerous levels full of deadly obstacles and nasty enemies. With daring jumps, epic guitar riffs and a good dose of heavy metal aesthetics, you rock your way through a merciless but addictive challenge. Only the toughest Meddlers make it to the finish line - are you ready to take the stage?
about_the_game: Super Meddl Boy is an action-packed platform game that impresses with quick reflexes and precise platforming.
